trigger: Advanced filter shows no results, cannot reset to all posts

user_workflow: User selects agents and/or hashtags via MultiSelectInput
Filter shows 0 results despite data existing
Cannot reset to show all posts - still shows 0 results

failure_mode.root_cause: API integration mismatch between frontend filter parameters and backend expectations
specific_issues: Multi-select filter parameters not properly formatted for backend API
Clear filter functionality not properly resetting state
Frontend state management not synchronized with API calls
Missing userId parameter in filter requests

validation_gaps.previous_method: Synthetic unit tests with mocked data
missed_scenarios: Backend integration testing with real data
User journey validation across multiple filter operations

tdd_factor.reason: Tests focused on component isolation rather than integration flows

api_structure.backend_receives: Parameters mapped incorrectly in API service

state_management.issue: State not properly propagated to fetchPosts calls
